caption: Two identical Spearmen-vs-Infantry standoffs, side by side. The left Spearmen keeps the new default file_major_reform: a casualty only closes the gap within its own file, so its rear ends up jagged -- some files run deeper than others. The right Spearmen opts out (file_major_reform: false, the historical behavior): the whole grid recomputes fresh from the live count every tick, so its rear reflows and re-centres uniformly instead.
